member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.EmailPayload
member.summary: Builds a mailto: URI payload for email composition.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.EmailPayload.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: The recipient email address. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.GeoPayload
member.summary: Builds a geo: URI payload for geographic coordinates.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.GeoPayload.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a new geographic coordinate payload.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.IPayload
member.summary: Interface for all QR code payload types.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.IPayload.GetPayloadString
member.summary: Returns the formatted payload string suitable for QR code encoding.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.PayloadBuilder
member.summary: Static factory for creating payload builders.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.SmsPayload
member.summary: Builds an SMS payload using the sms: URI scheme.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.SmsPayload.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: The phone number. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.UrlPayload
member.summary: Builds a URL payload, optionally prepending a scheme.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.UrlPayload.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: The URL string. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.UrlPayload.WithScheme(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the scheme to prepend if the URL does not already include one.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.VCardPayload
member.summary: Builds a vCard 4.0 payload for contact information.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.VCardPayload.#ctor(System.String)
member.param: The full name of the contact. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.VCardPayload.WithPhone(System.String,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.VCardPhoneType)
member.summary: Adds a phone number to the vCard.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.VCardPayload.WithEmail(System.String,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.VCardEmailType)
member.summary: Adds an email address to the vCard.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.VCardPhoneType
member.summary: Phone number types for vCard entries.

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.WiFiAuthType
member.summary: WiFi authentication types for the WIFI: QR code scheme.

member.name: F:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.WiFiAuthType.WPA2
member.summary: WPA2 authentication (maps to WPA in the WIFI: scheme).

member.name: F:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.WiFiAuthType.WPA3
member.summary: WPA3 authentication (maps to WPA in the WIFI: scheme).

member.name: T:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.WiFiPayload
member.summary: Builds a WiFi network connection payload using the WIFI: scheme.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.WiFiPayload.#ctor(System.String,System.String,ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.WiFiAuthType)
member.param: The network SSID. Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.WiFiPayload.WithHidden(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether the network is hidden.

member.name: M:ElBruno.QRCodeGenerator.Payloads.WiFiPayload.WithMetered(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether the network is metered (informational only, not part of standard scheme).
